name: WiFi & ADB Keep-Alive
author: Ava
description: Stay reachable. Wi-Fi stays on and ADB stays ready after crashes and reboots.
detail_description: Keeps Wi-Fi radio and ADB debugging alive across crashes and reboots so remote installs and LAN access do not vanish overnight. Prefers root; falls back to Shizuku. Never turns them off.

config.label: WiFi Keep-Alive
config.description: Keep the WiFi radio on when it is turned off; Android reconnects to saved networks automatically

config.label: ADB Keep-Alive
config.description: Keep USB/wireless ADB debugging on and preserve host authorization
